Here’s how you know

Official websites use .gov
A .gov website belongs to an official government organization in the United States.

Secure .gov websites use HTTPS
A lock ( ) or https:// means you’ve safely connected to the .gov website. Share sensitive information only on official, secure websites.

Image Usage Requirements

Any use of copyrighted images requires permission of the copyright holder or designated contact person. Images without a copyright may be used for any purpose.

If you have any questions, please contact the Plants Data Team.
